form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 3rd (Sr3) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway was 7th-11.9 at the bell, beaten 2 m by William Aitch (2:07.40) in MAIDEN on March 27 at $5. The ace draw may see him hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Leaving the 600m became unbalanced and broke stride.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr5) over 1609m after showing early pace at Newcastle beaten 30 m by Line Of Courage (1:57.20) in MAIDEN on April 2 at $41. Two runs back was well back in the run when 8th (Fr4) over 1609m at Newcastle beaten 22 m by Franco Styles (1:56.90) in MAIDEN on March 13 at $34. Hard to have.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke stride as the field negotiated the first turn.
Had a tendency to race roughly as the field negotiated the final turn.
Checked and broke stride as the field straightened for the run to the finish.
Galloped racing down the back straight on the final occasion.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 2nd (Fr3) over 1609m after showing early speed at Newcastle was 2nd-4.4 at the bell, beaten a head by Designa Label (1:56.50) in MAIDEN on March 28 at $15. May be worth a place in the exotics.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait during the score up and was put of position at the start.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into eighth behind Designa Label at Newcastle over 1609m in a MAIDEN on March 28 at $34. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5 m finishing third behind Roobee at Newcastle over 1609m in a MAIDEN on April 6 at $7. Might need easier.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third after a quick start, behind Shes A True Bling at Penrith over 1720m in a MAIDEN on March 26 at $8.50. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in leaving the 400m and contacted marker pegs.

form.formComment: Four-year-old gelding by Bettors Delight out of Super Deal having his first start. Showed ability when he won at Menangle in a trial on April 8 over 1609m. Cops a wide draw but has been impressing at the trials so looks to have talent.

form.formComment: Has struggled of late. Last start broke in score up and was out of position at the start 9th (Fr1) over 1609m at this track beaten 30 m by What For (1:54.50) in 3yo+ 0LTW o eligible 3yo+ NR47 on March 31 at $1.70. The start before 5th (Fr4) over 1609m after showing early speed at this track beaten 25 m by The Niteshift (1:51.90) in MAIDEN on March 17 at $2.60. Still learning but suspect there is ability there.
